Pain cycle. Alright, so the pain. So this is just you hammering away at questions that are basically just gonna make you feel like not good about where they are. So first question. Okay, so what have you done to work towards this goal so far? They're probably gonna say something like x, y, and z. Okay. What are you currently doing to hit this goal? Probably not enough because they're contacting you. How do you like that? Or do you like what you're doing right now? Okay, so people that are happy with what they're doing are going to be contacting you once again. And what results have you gotten with this so far with what you've been doing? What changes would you like to see over the next 12 weeks? And what's stopping you from getting there on your own? So literally every question I'm asking is just going to bring about a painful answer. And so I'm just further bringing them into the state of pain through those questions right there. Okay, so that's a pretty simple one. You're just going to ask one question after another. You're not really going to respond much, just as simple. Okay. And then to the next one. Okay. And then to the next one and just keep going. That's pretty much the pain.
